div.div: How a source table resolves through contracts, admission, canonical evaluation, to a metric formula variable

div.div:
1. Source Table + Fields
Source Table in external system with declared Source Fields

div.div:
2a. Source Contract (SC)
Declares table identity + expected fields
contract.source_contract

div.div:
2b. Admission Contract (AC)
Validation gateway (structural, identity, temporal, custom)
contract.admission_contract

div.div:
3. Observation Contract (OC) · DOUBLE BRIDGE
Consumes both SC + AC · Reader-scoped
(a) Directive to Reader: selects which SC fields to observe, defines SO shape
(b) Semantic bridge: observation_field_map maps source_field → business_field_id

div.div:
4. Source Object (SO)
Admitted source data · Immutable · Append-only
Source Object storage (Chapter 17)

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(0, 0, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(0, 0, 0));

div.div:
5. Canonical Mapping + Canonical Contract (CC)
Canonical Mapping: Business Field to Canonical Field, per Canonical Contract version
CC: defines CO shape = BO binding, resolves N SOs → 1 CO
contract.canonical_mapping + canonical_contract

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 228px; height: 1px; padding-top: 455px; margin-left: 711px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Business Field (BF)
Business Object (BO)
Static reference vocabulary
Business Fields and Business Objects
OC maps to BF · CC binds to BO

div.div:
6. Canonical Object (CO)
Business meaning resolved · Immutable · N SOs → 1 CO (primary, D023) · N COs → 1 CO (derived)
Canonical Object storage (Chapter 17)

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(0, 0, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(0, 0, 0));

rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 798px; height: 1px; padding-top: 740px; margin-left: 81px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
7. Metric Contract (MC) + Metric Binding
Metric Binding: Metric Contract references Canonical Contract via canonical field names
MC formula references CO fields · N:M binding (D021) · One MC per KPI (D024, 687 total)
metric.metric_binding + contract.metric_contract

div.div:
8. Metric Snapshot (MS)
Computed KPI value · Immutable · Primary (from COs) or Derived (from upstream MSs)
Metric Snapshot storage (Chapter 17)

div.div: 1.Table → 2a.SC + 2b.AC (parallel) → 3.OC (consumes both) → 4.SO → 5.Mapping+CC → 6.CO → 7.MC+Binding → 8.MS · BF/BO = static reference (not in chain)
